text: Boys Hostel is located inside the Campus with 3 blocks and a total capacity of 480 boys. Girls Hostel is situated in Sholinganallur, 5 km from campus, with 1 block and 210 girls capacity.
The Boys Hostel has 233 non-AC rooms and 6 AC rooms, accommodating 2 persons per room.
The Girls Hostel has 71 rooms, accommodating 3 persons per room, and does not provide AC facilities.
Rooms are furnished with cot, mattress, pillows, bed-spreads, individual cupboards, chair-table, lamp, and wall hangers.
Girls Hostel rooms include cot, mattress, pillows, bed-spreads, individual cupboards, chair-table, lamp, wall hangers, bath & toilet, wash basin, and mirror.
Other facilities include fan, water heater, WiFi, TV Hall, LCD-TV, indoor games, reading room, and land-line phone.
The Girls Hostel provides fan, water heater, WiFi, TV Hall, LCD-TV, indoor games, reading room, and land-line phone.
The College Main Library and Computer Centre are open till 7:00 PM for boys.
The Library and Computer facilities are available for girls until 9:00 PM.
Students must occupy allotted rooms and refrain from anti-social activities. They are responsible for their rooms' cleanliness.
Visitors are allowed only if mentioned in the authorized list, and access is granted on holidays from 11:00 A.M. to 6:00 P.M.
The hostel mess serves both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. Mess charges are annual, payable at the time of admission.

Breakfast: 07:00 A.M. to 08:00 A.M. (Holidays: 07:30 A.M. to 09:00 A.M.). Lunch: 01:00 P.M. to 01:45 P.M. (Holidays: 12:30 P.M. to 02:00 P.M.). Dinner: 07:00 P.M. to 08:30 P.M. (Holidays: 07:00 P.M. to 09:00 P.M.).
Games and TV timings on working days: 04:30 P.M. to 06:00 P.M. and on holidays: 09:00 A.M. to 12:00 P.M.
Morning study hours: 05:00 A.M. to 07:00 A.M. and evening study hours: 06:00 P.M. to 07:00 P.M.
The cafeteria accommodates 100 students, operating from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM and serving breakfast, lunch, snacks, and beverages.
President: Dr. K.S. Srinivasan, Officer In-charge: Dr. S. Vijayakumar, Manager: Mr. Arun, Head of Student Affairs: Dr. K.P. Santhosh Nathan.
Canteen staff includes Mr. Abdul Rashid (Cook), Mr. Kannan (Assistant Cook), and Mr. Shankar (Assistant Cook).
